steps.t: Bingo plans to go see Cuthbald on the eastern side of the town of Harwick, in the Wold. Bingo has reluctantly agreed to see the horses available for s…
Cuthbald the horse trader is at his stall on the eastern side of Harwick, in the Wold.
Several fine horses are available for your perusal at Cuthbald's stall on the eastern side of Harwick, in the Wold.
Bingo is at Cuthbald's stall on the eastern side of the town of Harwick, in the Wold. Bingo has reluctantly agreed to see the horses available for sal…
Cuthbald the horse trader is at his stall on the eastern side of Harwick, in the Wold.
Cuthbald has asked to meet you on the west side of Harwick, near the Crafting Hall. Cuthbald thinks he may have one more chance to find a suitable ste…
Cuthbald has shown you a pony on the west side of Harwick, and you should assess whether he would be a good steed for Bingo.
Bingo is on the west side of Harwick, near the Crafting Hall. Bingo seems quite taken with the pony that Cuthbald has shown you.
Cuthbald is on the west side of Harwick, near the Crafting Hall.
Cuthbald has challenged you to search Harwick for food that the picky Tanglemane will eat.
Cuthbald is on the west side of Harwick, near the Crafting Hall. You found Tanglemane's favourite food, and now Cuthbald will happily give the pony to…
Bingo is on the west side of the town of Harwick, near the Crafting Hall.
